sevenDayForecast.headline: A tropical low (15U) may form well north of the Pilbara coast tomorrow.
points: A tropical low (15U) may form on Wednesday, well to the north of the Pilbara coast.
It is expected to move west southwest, and may gradually develop. It has a Low risk of developing into a tropical cyclone from Friday.
From late Sunday, Tropical Low 15U may move into a less favourable environment and begin to weaken.
15U is forecast to stay over open waters, with no direct impacts expected to WA mainland or island communities.
